syncStatus: local main is in sync with origin/main — nothing to push
summary: LINE-integrated delivery ordering system for Love Pier Beach Cafe: a guided full-screen order wizard (LINE login -> GPS distance check -> menu -> summary -> PromptPay QR -> success) plus an Events feature (list, detail page, gallery) and an admin backoffice for orders/settings/events.
note: Commits after 2676ad3 (guided order flow rewrite + events feature) were made in a separate session, not this one. This file reflects the current state of the repo regardless of which session did the work.

featureAreas.status: current architecture — replaced the earlier DeliveryGate + CartDrawer bottom-sheet
featureAreas.notes: Single linear wizard on /delivery: welcome -> distance check -> menu -> summary -> payment -> success. Full-screen, app-like — site nav/footer are hidden during steps 2-6 via lib/chrome.js. Out-of-radius customers must tick an explicit acknowledgement (courier is their own responsibility, no shop delivery fee) before continuing; a second checkbox gates final payment submission. Includes a visible distance-simulation toggle for testing both radius cases without real GPS. DeliveryGate.js and the old CartDrawer wizard steps were deleted as part of this rewrite.

Redesigned as a proper welcome/warning screen (big emoji + heading + distance badge) instead of small scanning-animation text. Radar/pin scanning animation (components/delivery/LocatingAnimation.js) now only shows during the actual locating/calculating phases — LocatingAnimation was also switched from hand-rolled CSS radar/pulse to a hosted Lottie animation (via <dotlottie-wc> web component, loaded from unpkg) plus a CSS pin-drop.

pages/api/delivery-distance.js computes distance (haversine or Google Routes, chosen in /admin/settings) and delivery fee (lib/deliveryFee.js: base + per-km, server-side only, recomputed again in /api/orders — never trusts a client-sent fee).

lib/deliverySession.js — module-scoped cache of LINE profile + distance/fee learned during OrderFlow, so re-adding items later (e.g. from /promotion) doesn't ask the customer to log in or share location again.
LINE Login via lib/liff.js. PromptPay QR is a company Bill Payment QR (lib/promptpay.js) — Biller ID 010554511741402 for บริษัท เลิฟเพียร์ จำกัด, not phone PromptPay.
Attach-slip button always shown; auto-verifies via SlipOK when configured in /admin/settings, otherwise stores the slip image (private Supabase bucket 'slips') for manual review in /admin/orders.

lib/orderFlex.js builds a Tassana-style card sent both customer-side (liff.sendMessages) and shop-side (Messaging API push to the customer) via lib/lineMessaging.js. Links to a public /order/[orderNo] status page.

/events now splits into Upcoming/Past sections derived from the date (never manual), with portrait cards, a location badge, and desaturated styling for past events. New /events/[id] detail page: hero image, sticky info sidebar (date/time range, venue, organizer, registration info), category + price badges, description, photo gallery. Admin event form gained organizer/registration/end-date fields and a 10-image gallery cap (client + server). Additive schema columns: end_date, organizer, registration_info_th/en/zh. Fixed a bug where a partial PUT (e.g. drag-reorder sending only {sortOrder}) reset every other field including the gallery — now only touches fields present in the request.
components/menu/MenuSections.js Lightbox gained an optional thumbnail-strip mode (thumbnails prop), used by the new event gallery; /menu's lightbox usage is unchanged.

/admin/orders (list + status dropdown + pending badge in sidebar), /admin/settings (distance method, shop coords, radius, delivery fee, SlipOK keys), /admin/events (extended CRUD). Login: cafe.lovepier@gmail.com.

Both pages render components/menu/MenuExperience.js (single source of truth) so future menu-layout edits apply to both. MenuCard's Add-to-cart no longer auto-opens the cart drawer (added onCartClick prop) — lets customers keep tapping through the menu and add several items in a row inside the new OrderFlow menu step.
vitest (npm run test). lib/geo.test.js (haversineKm), lib/deliveryFee.test.js (calcDeliveryFee) — 10 tests passing as of the last check.

knownBugsFixedHistorically: GPS error text froze in the wrong language (stale-closure i18n bug) — fixed by storing error codes instead of pre-translated strings.
Leaflet crash 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading layerPointToLatLng)' — fixed by calling map.setView() before circle.getBounds().
CartDrawer/OrderFlow read deliverySession only once on app mount (before the gate finished) — fixed to re-check on relevant open/step events.
Event PUT route reset all fields (including gallery) on a partial update like drag-reorder — fixed to only touch fields present in the request.

followUps.item: Fix pre-existing React Compiler lint errors (unrelated to delivery/events feature work)
followUps.location: pages/reservation.js:181 (setState sync in effect), tweaks-panel.jsx:235/303 (ref access during render)
followUps.status: not started — flagged as a separate background task, not yet applied

followUps.item: SlipOK not yet configured in production
followUps.detail: slipok_api_key / slipok_branch_id were empty in the settings table as of the last check — slips are stored for manual review until the shop signs up at slipok.com and enters keys in /admin/settings.

followUps.item: Google Routes API not yet configured
followUps.detail: distance_method was 'straight' (free haversine) as of the last check. Switch to 'google' in /admin/settings + add a Google Maps API key for real driving-distance.

followUps.item: delivery_base_fee / delivery_per_km_rate were 0 as of the last check
followUps.detail: Delivery fee feature is live but charges nothing until the shop sets real values in /admin/settings.

components/delivery/OrderFlow.js is now the primary /delivery checkout; CartDrawer.js still exists and was touched in the same range of commits (16 lines) — its exact current role (e.g. whether it still opens on other pages) hasn't been re-audited this session.
